name: Hariharan R
tagline: I craft engaging videos that connect with audiences — from short-form reels to long-form content, every edit tells your story.
aboutP1: I'm Hariharan R, a passionate video editor based in Chennai. I specialise in creating high-quality edits that capture attention and tell stories that resonate — whether it's a reel, a YouTube video, or a brand film.
aboutP2: With 2+ years of hands-on editing experience and a keen eye for pacing and visual flow, I bring creativity and precision to every project I work on.

skills.title: Video Editing
skills.desc: Creating smooth, engaging edits with perfect pacing, cuts, and transitions that keep viewers hooked from start to finish.

skills.title: Colour Correction
skills.desc: Enhancing the visual mood of every video with colour grading and correction to match the tone and style of your content.

skills.title: Short-Form Content
skills.desc: Specialised in crafting punchy, scroll-stopping reels and short videos optimised for Instagram, YouTube Shorts, and more.

skills.title: Sound & Music Sync
skills.desc: Matching visuals to music and audio with precision — syncing beats, adding sound effects, and balancing audio levels.
